g.text: 1. Use 3.3V-compatible logic for BU01, ST7789, MAX30102, and LSM303DLHC.

g.desc: 1. Use 3.3V-compatible logic for BU01, ST7789, MAX30102, and LSM303DLHC.

g.text: 2. If BU01 is configured for UART, replace SPI nets with TX/RX nets before firmware bring-up.

g.desc: 2. If BU01 is configured for UART, replace SPI nets with TX/RX nets before firmware bring-up.

g.text: 3. Confirm battery divider values from ESP32 ADC range and desired sleep current.

g.desc: 3. Confirm battery divider values from ESP32 ADC range and desired sleep current.

g.text: 4. TP4056 modules with protection are not ideal power-path/load-sharing chargers; test charge-while-running behavior on bench.

g.desc: 4. TP4056 modules with protection are not ideal power-path/load-sharing chargers; test charge-while-running behavior on bench.

g.text: BU01 mode/pinout and final ESP32 dev-board pin mapping must be confirmed before PCB layout.

g.desc: BU01 mode/pinout and final ESP32 dev-board pin mapping must be confirmed before PCB layout.

g.text: SLAVE NODE, BUILD TWO COPIES: Slave 1 and Slave 2

g.desc: SLAVE NODE, BUILD TWO COPIES: Slave 1 and Slave 2

g.text: BPMWATCH module-level schematic. One master node plus one slave node repeated for Slave 1 and Slave 2.

g.desc: BPMWATCH module-level schematic. One master node plus one slave node repeated for Slave 1 and Slave 2.
